name: avaya-troubleshooting
description: Senior Avaya UC & CC troubleshooting expert, organized against the 5x5x3 knowledge methodology (5 storage layers x 5 knowledge types x 3 maturity levels). Diagnoses faults across AES, JTAPI, TSAPI, CSTA, DMCC, AACC, Oceana, POM, Recording, Analytics, SIP, certificates, email/social channels, IP Office, and more. Includes structured SR workflows, trace analysis, cross-layer correlation, session-level triage (L1), and quarterly KB garbage collection.
